title: EIV IntentSpec v1.0
description: Signature-authorized intent specification for EIV validation. Defines the constraints an AI agent's on-chain execution must satisfy.

spec_version.description: Schema version. Must be '1.0' for this schema.

allowed_targets.description: Contracts the agent may call during execution (A:Target check).

allowed_spenders.description: Addresses the agent may approve as ERC-20 spenders (C:AuthExpansion check).

token_in.description: Input token contract address. Use 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee for native ETH (EIP-7528).

token_out.description: Output token contract address (B:Recipient check verifies output goes to the authorized recipient).

max_amount_in.description: Maximum input amount (uint256 as string). D:Amount check.

min_amount_out.description: Minimum output amount (uint256 as string). D:Amount check.

recipient.description: Authorized recipient for output tokens (B:Recipient check).

deadline.description: Unix timestamp after which execution is invalid (E:Deadline check).

require_zero_residual.description: If true, all allowances must be zeroed after execution (F:Residual check).

bounded_approval.description: If true, approve amounts must not exceed max_amount_in (C:AuthExpansion check).

max_slippage_bps.description: Maximum slippage in basis points. Null triggers G:SpecQuality warning.
